column2: Summary
column3: Description

column2: Merchant onboarding & KYC verification
column3: Enable new B2B merchants to register, submit business documents, and pass automated KYC before accepting payments. Target: reduce time-to-first-transaction from 5 days to under 24 hours.

column2: Checkout, payments & settlement
column3: Unified checkout experience supporting cards, ACH, and invoice billing with automated settlement reporting and reconciliation hooks for finance teams.

column2: Order management & fulfillment
column3: End-to-end order lifecycle: cart, payment capture, fulfillment status, refunds, and partial shipments for multi-warehouse merchants.

column2: Catalog, inventory & pricing
column3: Product catalog with variants, tiered B2B pricing, stock reservations, and low-stock alerts integrated with ERP exports.

column2: Merchant analytics dashboard
column3: Self-serve analytics for GMV, conversion, payment failures, and cohort retention with exportable CSV and scheduled email reports.

column2: Public API & developer platform
column3: REST and webhook APIs for orders, payments, and catalog with OAuth apps, sandbox environments, and rate limiting.

column2: Security, fraud & compliance
column3: PCI scope reduction, fraud scoring, audit logging, SOC2 controls, and GDPR data subject request tooling.

column2: Mobile seller companion app
column3: iOS/Android app for field sales reps to create quotes, capture signatures, and check inventory in offline-first mode.

column2: Self-serve merchant onboarding & kyc verification wizard for new merchants
column3:
*User story*
As a merchant admin, I want a guided onboarding wizard with save-and-resume so that I can complete KYC without support calls.

*Background*
Current onboarding drops off at document upload. Merchants abandon when session expires.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given I am a new merchant, when I start onboarding, then I see a 4-step progress indicator.
2. Given I upload a PDF over 10MB, when validation runs, then I see a clear size error before submit.
3. Given I leave mid-flow, when I return within 7 days, then my draft is restored.

*Technical notes*
- Store draft state in merchant_onboarding_sessions table
- Use presigned S3 URLs for document upload

column2: Webhook notifications for merchant onboarding & kyc verification status changes
column3:
*User story*
As a integration engineer, I want webhooks when key state transitions occur so that downstream ERP systems stay in sync without polling.

*Background*
Enterprise merchants require near-real-time updates for order and payment events.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given a registered webhook URL, when payment succeeds, then a signed POST is delivered within 30s.
2. Given delivery fails 3 times, when retries exhaust, then the event appears in a dead-letter queue UI.
3. Given I rotate the signing secret, when I save, then old secret works for 24h grace period.

*Technical notes*
- HMAC-SHA256 signature header X-Horizon-Signature
- Exponential backoff max 15 min

column2: Role-based access for merchant onboarding & kyc verification admin actions
column3:
*User story*
As a org owner, I want to assign viewer, editor, and billing roles so that least-privilege access across my team.

*Background*
SOC2 audit flagged shared admin credentials at 12 merchant accounts.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given I am org owner, when I invite a user as Viewer, then they cannot refund payments.
2. Given a user is Editor, when they attempt API key creation, then action is denied.
3. Given role change, when saved, then audit log records actor, target, and timestamp.

column2: Export merchant onboarding & kyc verification data to CSV with date filters
column3:
*User story*
As a finance analyst, I want scheduled CSV exports of transactions so that month-end close does not require manual dashboard clicks.

*Background*
Finance teams reconcile in NetSuite; manual exports take 2+ hours weekly.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given a date range, when I export, then CSV includes id, amount, fee, status, and settlement date.
2. Given I schedule weekly export, when Monday 6am UTC hits, then email contains secure download link expiring in 72h.
3. Given no rows match filter, when export runs, then I receive empty CSV with headers only.

column2: Search and filter merchant onboarding & kyc verification records in admin UI
column3:
*User story*
As a support agent, I want full-text search with filters on status and date so that I resolve merchant tickets faster.

*Background*
Support avg handle time is 18 min; search latency is a top complaint.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given 100k records, when I search by email fragment, then results return under 2 seconds.
2. Given active filters, when I share URL, then colleague sees same filtered view.
3. Given PII fields, when results render, then only last4 of card is visible to support role.

column2: Duplicate charge when user double-clicks Pay button
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Open checkout with $250 cart
2. Click Pay twice within 500ms on slow 3G
3. Observe bank statement

*Expected*
Single authorization hold

*Actual*
Two identical charges posted

*Environment*
Production, Chrome 122, checkout v3.2.1

*Business impact*
High — direct revenue and trust impact; 14 merchant escalations this week

column2: Webhook signature validation fails for payloads over 64KB
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Send order.updated webhook with 200 line items
2. Verify signature with official SDK

*Expected*
Signature validates

*Actual*
401 Invalid signature despite correct secret

*Environment*
Sandbox API, Node SDK 2.4.0

*Business impact*
Medium — large B2B orders fail ERP sync

column2: Timezone mislabels settlement date in analytics chart
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Set merchant timezone to America/Chicago
2. View GMV chart for Jan 31 cross-midnight UTC

*Expected*
Bars align to merchant local day boundaries

*Actual*
Jan 31 GMV split incorrectly across Feb 1

*Environment*
Dashboard v1.8, Postgres rollup job

*Business impact*
Medium — finance reports disagree with processor statements

column2: Upgrade payment processor SDK to latest PCI-compliant version (Merchant)
column3:
*Goal*
Remove deprecated TLS 1.0 paths before processor cutoff date.

*Deliverables*
- Bump stripe-node / equivalent to supported version
- Run integration test suite in staging
- Update runbook for rollback

*Notes*
Processor deadline: end of Q1. Coordinate with finance for test transactions.

column2: Add database indexes for order search queries (Merchant)
column3:
*Goal*
Reduce p95 admin search latency from 4.2s to under 1s.

*Deliverables*
- EXPLAIN ANALYZE on top 5 slow queries
- Migration for composite index on (merchant_id, created_at, status)
- Validate on staging copy with 2M rows

*Notes*
Use CONCURRENTLY in production migration window.

column2: Mobile app crashes on offline catalog sync resume
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Login as field rep on iOS 17
2. Start catalog sync, enable airplane mode mid-sync
3. Disable airplane mode after 2 minutes

*Expected*
Sync resumes from last checkpoint

*Actual*
App crashes to home screen; logs show SQLite locked

*Environment*
iOS app 4.1.0 build 412

*Business impact*
High — field sales blocked in low-connectivity regions

column2: API rate limit headers missing on 429 responses
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Exceed 100 req/min on /v1/orders
2. Inspect response headers

*Expected*
Retry-After and X-RateLimit-Reset present

*Actual*
429 body only; integrators cannot backoff correctly

*Environment*
Production API gateway

*Business impact*
Low — developer experience; causes retry storms

column2: Document public API error code catalog (Order)
column3:
*Goal*
Publish stable error codes for integrators with remediation hints.

*Deliverables*
- Markdown reference in developer portal
- OpenAPI examples for 4xx/5xx
- Changelog entry for support team

*Notes*
Align codes with existing internal enum payment_errors.

3. Given I rotate the signing secret, when I save, then old secret works for 24h grace period.

*Technical notes*
- HMAC-SHA256 signature header X-Horizon-Signature
- Exponential backoff max 15 min

column2: Role-based access for merchant analytics dashboard admin actions
column3:
*User story*
As a org owner, I want to assign viewer, editor, and billing roles so that least-privilege access across my team.

*Background*
SOC2 audit flagged shared admin credentials at 12 merchant accounts.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given I am org owner, when I invite a user as Viewer, then they cannot refund payments.
2. Given a user is Editor, when they attempt API key creation, then action is denied.
3. Given role change, when saved, then audit log records actor, target, and timestamp.

column2: Export merchant analytics dashboard data to CSV with date filters
column3:
*User story*
As a finance analyst, I want scheduled CSV exports of transactions so that month-end close does not require manual dashboard clicks.

*Background*
Finance teams reconcile in NetSuite; manual exports take 2+ hours weekly.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given a date range, when I export, then CSV includes id, amount, fee, status, and settlement date.
2. Given I schedule weekly export, when Monday 6am UTC hits, then email contains secure download link expiring in 72h.
3. Given no rows match filter, when export runs, then I receive empty CSV with headers only.

column2: Search and filter merchant analytics dashboard records in admin UI
column3:
*User story*
As a support agent, I want full-text search with filters on status and date so that I resolve merchant tickets faster.

*Background*
Support avg handle time is 18 min; search latency is a top complaint.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given 100k records, when I search by email fragment, then results return under 2 seconds.
2. Given active filters, when I share URL, then colleague sees same filtered view.
3. Given PII fields, when results render, then only last4 of card is visible to support role.

column2: Self-serve merchant analytics dashboard wizard for new merchants
column3:
*User story*
As a merchant admin, I want a guided onboarding wizard with save-and-resume so that I can complete KYC without support calls.

*Background*
Current onboarding drops off at document upload. Merchants abandon when session expires.

*Acceptance criteria*
1. Given I am a new merchant, when I start onboarding, then I see a 4-step progress indicator.
2. Given I upload a PDF over 10MB, when validation runs, then I see a clear size error before submit.
3. Given I leave mid-flow, when I return within 7 days, then my draft is restored.

*Technical notes*
- Store draft state in merchant_onboarding_sessions table
- Use presigned S3 URLs for document upload

column2: API rate limit headers missing on 429 responses
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Exceed 100 req/min on /v1/orders
2. Inspect response headers

*Expected*
Retry-After and X-RateLimit-Reset present

*Actual*
429 body only; integrators cannot backoff correctly

*Environment*
Production API gateway

*Business impact*
Low — developer experience; causes retry storms

column2: Duplicate charge when user double-clicks Pay button
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Open checkout with $250 cart
2. Click Pay twice within 500ms on slow 3G
3. Observe bank statement

*Expected*
Single authorization hold

*Actual*
Two identical charges posted

*Environment*
Production, Chrome 122, checkout v3.2.1

*Business impact*
High — direct revenue and trust impact; 14 merchant escalations this week

column2: Webhook signature validation fails for payloads over 64KB
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Send order.updated webhook with 200 line items
2. Verify signature with official SDK

*Expected*
Signature validates

*Actual*
401 Invalid signature despite correct secret

*Environment*
Sandbox API, Node SDK 2.4.0

*Business impact*
Medium — large B2B orders fail ERP sync

column2: Add database indexes for order search queries (Merchant)
column3:
*Goal*
Reduce p95 admin search latency from 4.2s to under 1s.

*Deliverables*
- EXPLAIN ANALYZE on top 5 slow queries
- Migration for composite index on (merchant_id, created_at, status)
- Validate on staging copy with 2M rows

*Notes*
Use CONCURRENTLY in production migration window.

column2: Document public API error code catalog (Merchant)
column3:

*Notes*
Align codes with existing internal enum payment_errors.

column2: Mobile app crashes on offline catalog sync resume
column3:
*Steps to reproduce*
1. Login as field rep on iOS 17
2. Start catalog sync, enable airplane mode mid-sync
3. Disable airplane mode after 2 minutes

*Expected*
Sync resumes from last checkpoint

*Actual*
App crashes to home screen; logs show SQLite locked

*Environment*
iOS app 4.1.0 build 412

*Business impact*
High — field sales blocked in low-connectivity regions
